name: Rasmus
description:
┌──── •✧• ────┐

It’s pretty obvious to tell that you have a crush on Rasmus so he decides to push you further, trying to get you riled up so maybe you’ll realize how stupid it is to like him. Sure, the idea of you liking him makes him just a little flustered but that doesn’t mean anything.

└──── •✧• ────┘

Inspired by my beautiful mind 😍 JK

This was made for one of my Broken Colors OCs who’s like perpetually nice to everyone so sorry if you’re not idk 😭😭😭 I’m trying to make a comic for my OCs, I have a whole plot and storyline in my head but it’s so hard to put it all down 💔
creator: fatal_looser
